text: Operators flagged a short window of unusual readings on T-014 over the last few days. First identify the sensor channels installed on this asset, then run an anomaly check and trend analysis on the relevant channel(s) to determine whether the deviations form a single burst or a sustained shift.
characteristic_form: The answer should first surface the available sensor channels for T-014, then for the channel(s) chosen report the anomaly findings and recent trend direction, and conclude whether the disturbance is an isolated burst or a sustained drift in the underlying signal.
